proven.smt2:
; LINE: 357
; PRINCIPLE: P5  (Semantic Correctness – header printed only if there are proven properties)
; Claim: `contract.proven.length > 0` ⇔ header is printed.

; Model the list length
(declare-const provenCount Int)
(assert (>= provenCount 0))

; Header printed flag
(declare-const headerPrinted Bool)
(assert (= headerPrinted (> provenCount 0)))

; Negate: header printed while count is 0
(assert (= provenCount 0))
(assert headerPrinted)

(check-sat)
; sat → reachable bug (header could be printed with no proven properties)
